title: Elements of Power | The Becoming of Ora | Part 1
look: epic cosmic fantasy digital painting, cinematic movie frame, glowing elemental energy, luminous sci fi light, majestic and reverent, rich color with soft rose pink accents, highly detailed, no text, no words, no letters

scenes.label: The Becoming of Ora
scenes.narr: Before she ever commanded the elements, Ora Meir Jackson was a church girl with a candle, a Bible, and one dangerous question. Does God want me to learn about the elements?

She had been taught to fear what she could not find in the hymnal. But when she finally prayed the question out loud, the answer did not come as a warning. It came as a dove, as light, as fire and living water poured out on both sides of her.
And something in her woke up. The fire did not burn her. The water did not drown her. She was not leaving God. She was meeting Him inside His own elements.
She learned the earth first. How the ground steadies a shaking heart, the way an early study watched stress settle when skin met soil.
Then the water, and the peace that moves through a body that stands beside it.
Then the wind, and the slow breath that calms the storm inside.
And people began to gather. The ones who carried the same question she once hid. She became their teacher.

scenes.label:
The elements are not against God.
They are His first language.
scenes.narr: Hear what Ora learned, and speak it with her. The elements are not against God. They are His first language.

scenes.label: Follow the Becoming of Ora.
scenes.narr: This is her story, and maybe it is yours. Follow the Becoming of Ora, and activate the elements with us.
